result=True
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['attraction', 'airplane', 'train'] and activity_tickets(activity)!=2: result=False
  if innercity_transport_type(activity_transports(activity))=='metro'and metro_tickets(activity_transports(activity))!=2: result=False
nature_language: We are 2 people traveling from Wuhan to Chengdu for 2 days, with the following requirements: we want to stay at one of the following hotels: Huayueju Serviced Apartment (Chengdu Financial City Yintai Center). We do not want to use taxis for transportation within the city.
